subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath aided His servants to turn unto Him on a Day wherein most of His creation hath turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید عباده علی الاقبال الیه فی یوم فیه اعرض اکثر خلقه و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prophecy and fulfillment
